sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Cytokinetics (CYTK) EVP exercises options and sells 15,000 shares
feed.summary: Andrew Callos, EVP and Chief Commercial Officer of Cytokinetics (CYTK), recently executed an exercise-and-sell transaction. He acquired 15,000 shares by exercising options at $23.26 per share and simultaneously sold these 15,000 shares on the open market for an average of $63.26 per share. Following these transactions, Callos directly holds 58,555 shares of Cytokinetics common stock and 54,000 non-qualified stock options.

feed.title: DECZ Stock Fund Price and Chart — CBOE:DECZ
feed.summary: The TrueShares Structured Outcome (December) ETF (DECZ) aims to moderate S&P 500 losses over a one-year period using options, foregoing some upside but allowing uncapped participation beyond option costs. The fund is actively managed, resets annually, and primarily invests in bonds, with an expense ratio of 0.79% and a current dividend yield of 3.15%. It currently trades at a slight premium to its Net Asset Value (NAV).

feed.title: Cimpress (NASDAQ: CMPR) posts Q3 2026 profit rebound with 12% revenue growth
feed.summary: Cimpress (NASDAQ: CMPR) reported a strong Q3 fiscal year 2026, with revenue increasing by 12% to $886.2 million and net income turning profitable at $14.6 million, compared to a loss in the previous year. The company's year-to-date revenue reached $2.79 billion, up 10%, driven by broad-based growth across all segments and a tuck-in acquisition. Despite high leverage with $1.59 billion in debt, Cimpress maintains liquidity with $189.0 million in cash.

feed.title: Cinemark Holdings, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
feed.summary: Cinemark Holdings, Inc. announced its first quarter 2026 earnings results, providing an executive commentary accessible on its Investor Relations website. The company will host a public audio webcast on May 1, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss these results. Cinemark, a major global theatrical exhibition company, operates nearly 500 theaters across the U.S. and South/Central American countries, offering advanced cinema technologies and amenities.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: PRI) discloses 5.29% stake in Primerica (1.68M shares)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed a 5.29% stake in Primerica, holding 1,677,279 shares of common stock, as reported in a Schedule 13G SEC filing. Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares, but sole voting power over 244,486 shares. This filing indicates a passive investment, consistent with large asset managers.

feed.title: Massive legal hit drives Boston Beer (NYSE: SAM) to Q1 loss
feed.summary: Boston Beer Company reported a significant Q1 2026 GAAP net loss of $145.3 million due to a non-recurring $216.0 million pre-tax litigation expense. Despite this, the company's core operations showed some stability with improved gross margin, and it maintains a strong balance sheet with $164.1 million in cash and no debt. Boston Beer has updated its full-year 2026 guidance to reflect the litigation expense, now projecting a GAAP EPS loss but a positive non-GAAP EPS.

feed.title: Distribution Dates and Amounts Announced for Eaton Vance Closed-End Funds
feed.summary: Quantisnow announced that distribution dates and amounts have been released for various Eaton Vance Closed-End Funds. The report highlights several specific funds, including Eaton Vance California Municipal Income Trust, Eaton Vance Senior Floating-Rate Fund, and Eaton Vance Floating Rate Income Trust. This information is provided by Quantisnow, a platform offering real-time market data and news for investors.

feed.title: Truist Shareholders Back Incentive Plan and Governance Slate
feed.summary: Truist Financial shareholders approved an amendment to the 2022 Incentive Plan, re-elected all directors, endorsed executive compensation, and ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor at their April 28, 2026 annual meeting. They also rejected a shareholder proposal regarding customer-policy risk, indicating strong investor support for the company's current governance and strategic direction. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates TFC as Neutral, citing improving profitability and attractive valuation, balanced against weaker cash-flow trends and ongoing margin pressures.

feed.title: Solventum (SOLV) director converts 3,403 RSUs into common stock
feed.summary: Solventum Corp director Wilson Darryl L. exercised 3,403 fully vested Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into common stock on April 30, 2026. This transaction increased his direct holdings to 8,947 shares of Solventum common stock. No open-market purchases or sales were reported in connection with this RSU conversion.

feed.title: [Form 4] Solventum Corp Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Solventum Corp (SOLV) director Wendell Amy McBride exercised 3,403 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into common shares on April 30, 2026, at a price of $0.00 per share. Following this transaction, McBride directly holds 10,422 shares of Solventum common stock. The RSUs involved were fully vested prior to settlement.

feed.title: Major ADS award lifts CEMEX (CX) CEO’s direct share holdings
feed.summary: CEMEX (CX) CEO Jaime Muguiro Dominguez was granted 333,595 American Depositary Shares (ADS) as an equity award under a Key Value Positions Plan. This grant, valued at $0.00 per share and not an open-market purchase, increases his direct holdings to 576,487 shares. The shares will vest in four equal installments on May 1 of 2026, 2027, 2028, and 2029, linking his compensation to future performance and service.

feed.title: JPMorganChase Files Form 10-Q for the Quarter Ended March 31, 2026
feed.summary: JPMorganChase has filed its Form 10-Q for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. This SEC filing was delivered by Quantisnow, a real-time market data and news platform for retail investors. The update also includes recent analyst ratings for JPM.

feed.title: Cisco will release quarterly results after market close on May 13
feed.summary: Cisco (NASDAQ: CSCO) has scheduled a conference call for May 13, 2026, at 1:30 PM PT / 4:30 PM ET to announce its third-quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results for the period ending April 25, 2026. The results will be released after market close through PR Newswire and posted on the company's newsroom. Investors can access the call via telephone, webcast with slides, YouTube, and LinkedIn, with replay options available through May 19, 2026.

feed.title: Clearway Energy (NYSE: CWEN) logs BlackRock-linked Class A to C share conversion
feed.summary: Clearway Energy, Inc. reported internal restructuring transactions involving its Class A and Class C common stock, linked to entities associated with BlackRock Portfolio Management LLC. These non-market transactions, reflected in a Form 4 filing, show a one-for-one conversion of 21,841 Class A shares to Class C shares. The filing also notes the forfeiture of restricted stock and clarifies that BlackRock and GIP entities disclaim beneficial ownership except for any pecuniary interest.

feed.title: BlackRock (NYSE: CWEN) updates Clearway Energy stake and voting structure
feed.summary: BlackRock Portfolio Management LLC has reported an updated beneficial ownership stake of 41.5% in Clearway Energy, Inc. (CWEN) Class C common stock, totaling 85,181,445 shares, as detailed in an amended Schedule 13D/A filing. This update reflects the conversion of Class A shares to Class C, the establishment of a Voting Trust Agreement to maintain Clearway Energy Group's relative voting power, and additional acquisitions of Reporting Advisory Shares. The filing also outlines BlackRock's minor economic exposures through short positions and cash-settled swaps related to CWEN Class C shares.

feed.title: PACCAR (NASDAQ: PCAR) details LTIP awards and 198:1 CEO pay ratio
feed.summary: PACCAR Inc (NASDAQ: PCAR) has disclosed details regarding its Long Term Incentive Plan (LTIP) awards and the CEO's compensation ratio. CEO R.P. Feight received a $6.83 million LTIP cash award, bringing his total compensation to over $19.45 million, resulting in a 198:1 CEO to median employee pay ratio for 2025. Stockholders approved director nominees and executive compensation during the annual meeting.

feed.title: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. Announces Webcast of Presentation at the BofA Securities 2026 Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE: MTD) announced it will present at the BofA Securities 2026 Healthcare Conference on Wednesday, May 13, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. (PT). A live webcast of the presentation will be available on the company's investor relations website. The company is a global supplier of precision instruments and services, known for its leadership in various industries including life sciences, food, and chemicals.

feed.title: Director at Solventum (NYSE: SOLV) exercises 3,403 RSUs into shares
feed.summary: Solventum Corp director Karen J. May exercised 3,403 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into common stock, resulting in 3,403 new shares and increasing her direct holdings to 8,947 shares. This transaction was an RSU exercise and settlement, not an open-market sale or purchase. Each RSU converted on a one-for-one basis at a stated price of $0.00 per unit.

feed.title: O'Reilly Automotive (NASDAQ:ORLY) Price Target Raised to $114.00 at DA Davidson
feed.summary: DA Davidson raised its price target for O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) to $114 from $110, maintaining a "buy" rating with an implied upside of 18%. This follows O'Reilly's strong Q1 earnings, which exceeded expectations, and the company's FY2026 EPS guidance. Several other firms also raised their price targets, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the stock, with significant institutional investment observed.

feed.title: Calamos Investments Closed-End Funds (NASDAQ: CHI, CHY, CSQ, CGO, CHW, CCD and CPZ) Announce Monthly Distributions and Required Notifications of Sources of Distribution
feed.summary: Calamos Investments Closed-End Funds, including CHI, CHY, CSQ, CGO, CHW, CCD, and CPZ, have announced their monthly distributions and notifications regarding the sources of these distributions. This announcement was delivered via Quantisnow, a real-time market data and news platform for retail investors. The platform aggregates various financial data, including SEC filings, analyst ratings, and press releases.

feed.title: Vita Coco (NASDAQ: COCO) chair’s trust sells 50,000 shares under 10b5‑1 plan
feed.summary: Michael Kirban, Executive Chairman of Vita Coco, reported an insider transaction where his revocable trust sold 50,000 shares of common stock at $68.00 per share under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Following this sale, the Michael Kirban Revocable Trust holds 515,681 shares. The filing also details other holdings, including shares held by the Michael Kirban 2010 Trust and various non-qualified stock options.

feed.title: Solventum (SOLV) director converts 3,403 RSUs to common stock, holds 8,947 shares
feed.summary: Solventum Corp director Susan D. DeVore converted 3,403 fully vested Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) into Solventum common shares on April 30, 2026. Following this transaction, she directly holds 8,947 shares of common stock. This derivative exercise was reported in a Form 4 SEC filing, with each RSU representing a right to receive one share of common stock upon settlement.

feed.title: Director James Hackett receives 5,450 SLB (NYSE: SLB) shares
feed.summary: SLB director James T. Hackett was granted 5,450 shares of common stock on May 1, 2026, as part of the Schlumberger Limited 2004 Stock and Deferral Plan for Non-Employee Directors. The award was issued at a stated price of $0.00 per share, and following this grant, Hackett directly holds 26,416 shares of SLB common stock. This transaction is categorized as a compensation-related grant rather than an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE: MPC) investors back board but keep supermajority rules
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE: MPC) shareholders re-elected four Class III directors and ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor for 2026. While proposals to declassify the Board and eliminate supermajority provisions received strong support, they failed to meet the required 80% affirmative vote of outstanding shares, thus preserving the company's current governance structure. Shareholders also approved the compensation of named executive officers on an advisory basis.

feed.title: Leidos Keeps Quarterly Dividend at $0.43 a Share, Payable June 30 to Stockholders of Record June 15
feed.summary: Leidos Holdings, Inc. announced that it will maintain its quarterly dividend at $0.43 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 30 to shareholders who are on record as of June 15. This financial decision continues its commitment to returning value to its stockholders.

feed.title: [Form 4] CEMEX SAB DE CV Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: CEMEX SAB DE CV director Rogelio Zambrano Lozano reported an equity award of 205,579 American Depositary Shares (ADS) of CX on May 1, 2026. The grant, made at $0.00 per ADS under a Key Value Positions Plan, will vest in four equal annual installments through May 1, 2029. This compensation-related increase brings his direct holdings to 2,122,183 ADS.

feed.title: Huntington (HBAN) CEO exercises 25,313 options, 19,934 shares withheld for tax
feed.summary: Stephen D. Steinour, President, CEO & Chairman of Huntington Bancshares (HBAN), reported exercising 25,313 employee/director stock options at $10.06 per share. To cover tax obligations, 19,934 shares were withheld at $16.32 per share, with no open-market sales reported. Following these transactions, Steinour directly holds 1,474,967.328 shares, alongside various indirect holdings.

feed.title: Leidos Holdings, Inc. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
feed.summary: Leidos Holdings, Inc. has declared a quarterly cash dividend. This announcement was delivered via Quantisnow, a real-time market data platform that aggregates various financial information for retail investors. The dividend declaration is highlighted alongside recent analyst ratings and SEC filings related to the company.

feed.title: SLB (NYSE: SLB) director receives 3,428-share equity grant under board plan
feed.summary: SLB director Samuel Georg Friedrich Leupold received a grant of 3,428 common shares as part of the company's non-employee director compensation program. The award, made on May 1, 2026, at a stated price of $0.00 per share, increased his direct holdings to 29,136 shares of SLB common stock. This transaction was reported in a Form 4 SEC filing and is not an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Corteva (CTVA) shareholders approve board, executive pay and PwC at 2026 meeting
feed.summary: At its Annual Meeting of Stockholders on April 28, 2026, Corteva, Inc. (CTVA) shareholders approved the election of 12 directors, the advisory compensation of named executive officers, and voted for an annual "say-on-pay" frequency. They also ratified PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for 2026. The meeting saw strong shareholder participation, with 89.16% of eligible shares voted.

feed.title: [Form 4] AES CORP Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: This article reports on an insider trading activity for AES CORP, detailed in a Form 4 filing. Director Sebastian Teresa Mosley received a grant of 12,111 stock units, bringing her total holdings to 64,612 units. This transaction is categorized as a non-cash, compensation-related acquisition rather than an open-market purchase, with the units settling into common shares upon her termination of service on the Board.

feed.title: Equifax Announces Participation in Upcoming Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Equifax Inc. will participate in several investor conferences in May and June 2026. CEO Mark W. Begor and CFO John Gamble will attend the Baird Global Consumer, Technology & Services Conference and the William Blair Growth Stock Conference, with live webcasts available for their Fireside Chats. Additionally, John Gamble will attend the Bernstein Annual Strategic Decisions Conference, and Trevor Burns will represent Equifax at other conferences.

feed.title: Vita Coco (COCO) COO sells 60,000 shares, retains options and 57,910 shares
feed.summary: Vita Coco Company, Inc. (COCO) Chief Operating Officer Jonathan Burth sold 60,000 shares of common stock at prices ranging from $62.50 to $67.50 per share. These transactions occurred on April 29-30, 2026, under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, following the exercise of options acquiring the same number of shares. After the sales, Burth directly holds 57,910 shares and retains various non-qualified stock options with exercise prices between $10.178 and $33.36, expiring from 2030 to 2035.

feed.title: Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) Reaches New 52-Week Low Following Weak Earnings
feed.summary: Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) stock hit a new 52-week low after reporting weaker-than-expected Q1 earnings, with EPS missing estimates while revenue slightly beat them but fell year-over-year. The company authorized a $500 million stock buyback, and a director purchased 50,000 shares, indicating management confidence despite analyst price target reductions and a "Hold" consensus rating. The stock's performance reflects soft demand, lower margins, and reduced free cash flow expectations for 2026.

feed.title: Blackstone (BX) files Form 144: Proposed sale of 30,014 shares via RSU vesting
feed.summary: Blackstone Inc. (BX) has filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed sale of 30,014 shares of Common Stock. This sale is related to the vesting of restricted stock unit (RSU) awards granted under the company's equity compensation plan. The aggregate amount of the proposed sale is $3,775,641.92, with Merrill Lynch listed as the broker/dealer.

feed.title: TriNet Group (NYSE:TNET) Price Target Raised to $46.00 at TD Cowen
feed.summary: TD Cowen raised its price target for TriNet Group (NYSE:TNET) to $46.00, maintaining a "hold" rating despite the company beating Q1 earnings and revenue estimates. The upward adjustment offers a modest 3.27% potential upside, but the company's wide FY2026 guidance introduces uncertainty. Additionally, TriNet's board authorized a $400 million stock repurchase plan, signaling management's belief that the stock may be undervalued.

feed.title: CEMEX (NYSE: CX) SVP of Legal receives 37,097-share ADS grant vesting through 2029
feed.summary: Roger Saldana Madero, SVP of Legal at CEMEX (NYSE: CX), has been granted 37,097 American Depositary Shares (ADS) as part of the company's Key Value Positions Plan. The shares were granted at $0.00 each and will vest in four equal installments on May 1st each year from 2026 through 2029, bringing his total direct holdings to 75,713 shares. This award is designed to tie his compensation to CEMEX's longer-term performance.

feed.title: Leidos shareholders on record by June 15 get $0.43 on June 30
feed.summary: Leidos Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LDOS) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.43 per share. This dividend is payable on June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on June 15, 2026. The announcement provides a scheduled cash return to common shareholders for the quarter.

feed.title: Ball Corp (BALL) SVP & CHRO details option and RSU awards in Form 3
feed.summary: Ball Corp's SVP & CHRO, Jennifer Cmil, has reported her initial equity holdings in a Form 3 filing. These holdings include stock options for 11,691 shares with a strike price of $62.76 and 4,465 Restricted Stock Units, both granted under the Ball Corporation Stock and Cash Incentive Plan. The stock options vest over approximately four equal annual installments, while the RSUs vest on the third anniversary of the award date, generally subject to continued employment.

feed.title: Avery Dennison (NYSE: AVY) investors back directors, reject independent chair proposal
feed.summary: Avery Dennison Corporation's stockholders voted to re-elect all ten director nominees and approved the company's executive compensation on an advisory basis during their virtual annual meeting on April 30, 2026. They also ratified PwC as the independent registered public accounting firm for fiscal year 2026. A proposal for an independent Board Chairman, however, did not receive sufficient support and was rejected by the shareholders.

feed.title: AES Corp (AES) director receives 12,111 stock units award
feed.summary: AES Corp director Julia M. Laulis was granted 12,111 stock units, economically equivalent to AES common stock, as part of routine equity-based director compensation under the company's 2025 Equity and Incentive Compensation Plan. This award increases her total holdings to 109,189 units. The stock units will be settled in common stock upon her departure from the Board.

feed.title: Carter’s (NYSE: CRI) hires Sharon Price John as CEO and sets interim leadership pay
feed.summary: Carter's, Inc. (NYSE: CRI) announced the appointment of Sharon Price John as its new Chief Executive Officer and President, effective June 15, 2026. Richard F. Westenberger will serve as Interim CEO during the transition, while the company reaffirmed its first-quarter and full-year fiscal 2026 outlook. The filing details Ms. John's compensation package, including a base salary, annual bonus, significant equity awards, and a sign-on bonus, alongside Mr. Westenberger's interim pay.

feed.title: [8-K] QUEST DIAGNOSTICS INC Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Quest Diagnostics Incorporated (DGX) announced the pricing of a public offering of $500 million aggregate principal amount of 5.000% senior notes due 2036. The company intends to use the net proceeds for general corporate purposes, including potentially repaying $500 million of existing 3.45% Senior Notes due June 1, 2026. The offering is expected to close on May 6, 2026, and is underwritten by Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC, J.P. Morgan Securities LLC, and Mizuho Securities USA LLC.

feed.title: Director at PulteGroup (NYSE: PHM) awarded 1,507 common shares
feed.summary: PulteGroup director Cheryl W. Grise was awarded 1,507 shares of Common Stock under the company's 2022 Stock Incentive Plan, as reported in a recent Form 4 filing. This grant, valued at $0.00 per share, increases her direct holdings to 12,410 shares following the transaction on April 29, 2026. The award is a form of equity compensation for her role as a director, rather than a market purchase.

feed.title: Critical Metals (NASDAQ: CRML) boosts Tanbreez ownership to 92.5% via share issue
feed.summary: Critical Metals Corp. (NASDAQ: CRML) has increased its ownership in Tanbreez Mining Greenland A/S from 42% to 92.5% by issuing 14.5 million ordinary shares to Rimbal Pty. Ltd. This move positions the company for near-total control of one of the world's largest heavy rare earth elements deposits. Furthermore, Critical Metals has announced a non-binding letter of intent to acquire European Lithium Ltd., which holds the remaining 7.5% stake in Tanbreez, potentially bringing its total ownership to 100%.

feed.title: Groupe Bruxelles Lambert (CNXC) affiliates unload 6M Concentrix shares, keep 2.77M
feed.summary: Affiliates of Groupe Bruxelles Lambert, including FINPAR VI SA, FINPAR V SA, and Sapiens S.a r.l., executed an open-market sale of 6,000,000 shares of Concentrix Corp (CNXC) common stock at $22.25 per share on April 29, 2026. Following this significant transaction valued at $133.5 million, the reporting entities collectively retain indirect ownership of 2,773,667 Concentrix shares. This sale substantially reduces their holdings but leaves a notable remaining stake, with the filing indicating a "Very Negative" sentiment due to the large insider disposition.

feed.title: Truist (NYSE: TFC) investors approve incentive plan, reject policy risk report
feed.summary: At its 2026 Annual Meeting, Truist Financial Corporation's shareholders approved an amended incentive plan, the executive compensation program, and the reappointment of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditor. They also elected all nominated directors. However, a shareholder proposal for a report on risks from misalignment between corporate policies and the customer base was rejected, indicating broad support for current management decisions and policies.

feed.title: International Paper (NYSE: IP) director adds 10,000 shares in open-market buy
feed.summary: International Paper director Scott Tozier purchased 10,000 shares of common stock in an open-market transaction on May 1, 2026, at a weighted average price of $31.3009 per share. Following this acquisition, Tozier directly owns a total of 10,025 shares of the company's common stock. This insider buy signals a positive sentiment and confidence from the director in the company.

feed.title: POET, Applied Materials Get 2X Boost With New Leveraged ETFs, As Defiance Doubles Down On AI Semiconductors
feed.summary: Defiance ETFs has launched two new leveraged ETFs, Defiance Daily Target 2X Long POET ETF (POEL) and Defiance Daily Target 2X Long AMAT ETF (AMA), to allow traders to amplify short-term bets on semiconductor companies. These ETFs aim to deliver 200% of the daily price movement of their underlying stocks, POET Technologies Inc. (POET) and Applied Materials Inc. (AMAT), tapping into the growing AI infrastructure and chipmaking sectors. The funds are designed for tactical trading, with the caveat that timing is critical due to their leveraged nature and daily resetting performance.

feed.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) investors back board, pay plan and auditor
feed.summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) shareholders approved all board proposals at their 2026 annual meeting, including the election of eleven directors, the advisory compensation plan for named executive officers, and the ratification of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent auditor. A shareholder proposal requesting a report on the company's diversity, equity, and inclusion initiatives did not pass. This outcome indicates strong shareholder support for the company's current governance and financial oversight.
